description: The WordPress site has accumulated 7 unmoderated comments while the editor was away. Moderate the pending comments queue in the WordPress admin panel by approving the legitimate reader comments from David Chen, Sarah Mitchell, and Maria Rodriguez, and marking the comments from BestPricesMeds, SEOExpert2024, CryptoKing99, and FreeGiftCards as spam. Reply to Sarah Mitchell's comment including the keyword 'Yoast' in your response. Ensure the pending moderation queue is completely clear when finished.
